response.original_title: Club Classics - Universal Stories Of Dance
response.overview: The first volume in a series, UNIVERSAL STORIES OF DANCE explores the history of club music in the United Kingdom. A unique audiovisual experience, the program pairs breathtaking 3D graphics with a soundtrack mixed by DJ's Jon DaSilva and Mike Cosford, who were influential participants in the first wave of U.K. dance music. Beginning with the early acid house classics of 1986 to 1987, the soundtrack is a comprehensive chronology of British dance music's early days.
response.title: Club Classics - Universal Stories Of Dance
